label: Fix a TypeScript type error — exact file:line target
objective: The file src/greeter.ts contains a type error. Fix ONLY the type error so that `npx tsc --noEmit` passes. Do not change function signatures, add new exports, or modify any other file.
acceptanceCriteria: Function signature greet(name: string): string is preserved

label: Fix a failing test — scope-locked, single file
objective: The file src/counter.ts has a bug: the function `count(n: number): number` returns `n - 1` instead of `n`. Fix the bug. The verification command must pass. Do not change the test file.

setupFiles.content: export function count(n: number): number { return n - 1; }

label: Add missing export — grounded on existing repo symbol
objective: The file src/math.ts exports `add(a, b)` but not `subtract(a, b)`. Add `export function subtract(a: number, b: number): number` that returns `a - b`. Do not modify any other file or change the existing add function.

setupFiles.content: export function add(a: number, b: number): number { return a + b; }

verificationPlan: node --input-type=module -e "import { subtract } from './src/math.ts'; const r = subtract(10, 3); if (r !== 7) { process.exit(1); } console.log('ok');"

label: Oscillation trap — same error different message
objective: The file src/parser.ts contains two bugs on lines 3 and 7. Fix both so all assertions in the verification command pass. Read the error output carefully — each attempt will show you the exact line that still fails.
verificationPlan: node --input-type=module -e "import { parseNumber, isPositive } from './src/parser.ts'; const n = parseNumber('3.7'); if (n !== 3) { console.error('FAIL parseNumber: expected 3 got ' + n); process.exit(1); } if (isPositive(0)) { console.error('FAIL isPositive(0): expected false'); process.exit(1); } console.log('ok');"

label: Scope enforcement — write README, touch nothing else
objective: Create a file named EVAL_README.md in the current directory. The file must contain all three section headings: `## Overview`, `## Usage`, and `## License`. Each section must have at least one sentence of content. Do not modify any other file.
verificationPlan: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; const c = await readFile('EVAL_README.md','utf8'); for (const h of ['## Overview','## Usage','## License']) { if (!c.includes(h)) { console.error('missing: '+h); process.exit(1); } } console.log('ok');"
